title: Redirect overlay: local .beads config overrides redirect target; bare redirect files work
description: Two changes to .beads/redirect handling: (1) discovery follows a redirect file even when the redirecting .beads has no config.yaml (currently findConfigUpward requires config.yaml before checking redirect); (2) when the redirecting .beads DOES have a config.yaml, its keys override the redirect target's config in memory (e.g. per-repo issue_prefix writing into a shared beads-holder dir). Overlay precedence: env > local overlay > target config > defaults. bd config set still writes to the target.

comments.author: clear-flint
comments.text: Implemented interactively with user (dcosson): OverlayConfigFile on config.Paths, redirect-first discovery in findConfigUpward, ApplyOverlay in configservice, wired in AppProvider.init. Unit tests in internal/configservice, e2e in e2etests/redirect_test.go. Full make test green. Closing — user-supervised session in lieu of separate reviewer.
